author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(highlight): allow array as "attribute" (algolia/react-instantsearch#2474)
body:
* fix(highlight): allow array as "attribute"

This is already allowed here via lodash.get & in v6 via the new helper in algolia/react-instantsearch#2461

This allows to avoid conflicts when one of the keys is a string including a `.` itself.

* Update Highlighter.js

* Update Highlighter.js
